items.briefing:
New research highlights that financial services organisations face the highest rate of cyberattacks per device of any industry — a significant concern for Australian banks, insurers, and fintech firms handling sensitive customer data. Separately, OpenAI has moved to require hardware-backed passkeys for accessing its systems, reflecting a broader industry shift away from traditional passwords toward stronger authentication methods.

For most staff today, the key takeaway is simple: if your organisation offers passkey or multi-factor authentication options, enable them — they are significantly harder for attackers to compromise than a standard password.

featured.title: Financial services faces most cyberattacks per device
featured.quote: Australian financial services face elevated cyber risk due to legacy systems and slow patching.
